LanguageData.RimTalk_MyBabyNearby.label: 我的寶寶在身邊
LanguageData.RimTalk_MyBabyNearby.stages.0.label: 我的寶寶在身邊
LanguageData.RimTalk_MyBabyNearby.stages.0.descriptio: 我的寶寶在旁邊安靜地睡著呢...看看多可愛！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepAlone.label: 自己睡
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepAlone.stages.0.label: 自己睡
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepAlone.stages.0.descr: 媽媽，媽媽在哪里？有點怕...
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepWithOthers.label: 被大人帶著睡
好擠哦...那個人為什么不抱我？
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepInNursery.label: 在育兒室睡覺
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepInNursery.stages.0.d: 好多寶寶！窩不想睡覺，要和別的寶寶玩！
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepWithParents.label: 和家人一起睡
LanguageData.RimTalk_ToddlerSleepWithParents.stages.0: 枕頭...軟軟！呼嚕呼嚕...媽媽...
